title: ProDeo
text: Home * Engines * Rebel * ProDeo ProDeo , (Pro Deo) a free version of the former commercial Rebel chess program series by Ed Schröder with a complete rewritten personality setting in self-explainable natural language, making it one of the most tunable chess engines. ProDeo is WinBoard and UCI compliant and runs under Windows with various GUIs , and incorporates an open source EOC database . ProDeo played the DOCCC 2004 , ICT 2005 , DOCCC 2005 , DOCCC 2011 , and the ICT 2012 .
